column1: # Local additions to Skretzo's transport graph.
#   originX originY originPlane <TAB> destX destY destPlane <TAB> menuOption menuTarget objectID <TAB> Skills <TAB> Items <TAB> Quests <TAB> Varbits <TAB> VarPlayers <TAB> Duration <TAB> Display info
# Add rows here when the collision-debug overlay shows V2's BFS hitting a
# wall that has a real, openable gate/door in-game without a corresponding
# entry in Skretzo's bundled data. Keep rows alphabetically grouped by area.
# Lumbridge chicken pen — south gate (object 1560). Skretzo's upstream
# data doesn't include this gate, so V2's BFS treats the pen as
# fenced-in and can't plan pen→bank routes.
